---
description: Define the coding rules for the project
applyTo: **/*.py
---

# coding-guideline

## naming convention

- Use camelCase for function and variable names.
- Use PascalCase for class names.
- Use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants.

## coding style

- Use 4 spaces for indentation.

## error handling

- Use try-except blocks to handle exceptions gracefully.
- Log errors with meaningful messages for debugging purposes.
- Use structured logging to capture relevant context when exceptions occur.
- Create unit tests for all func
